summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification for 40 open PRs. No shared canonical was present, no hydrated item was security-sensitive, and no close/merge/fix action is safe under the job permissions; 9 ready PRs are item-scoped maintainer decisions and the rest are kept independent.
